title: No one here
description: A mod that's eerie in its silence.
body: # no_one_here ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/739e610894378e7a6cbe9799a87f27e38f029311_0.webp) > *"Are you sure you're alone here?"* --- ## What is this? A mod for your world that... changes the rules of the game. You enter a world. Everything is normal. You build a house, gather resources, tame a wolf. A day passes. Then another. And then you notice that **something is wrong**. --- ## Features - **The world becomes empty** - and it's not a bug - **Someone is watching** - don't turn around. Although... try it - **The mines are deeper than you thought** - much deeper - **Sometimes pearls lead elsewhere** - but that was only in the old version... probably - **C418 recorded something else** - find it and listen - **You have a new neighbor** - he left a note ![csad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a42ce1e06276843af434dee01907f3a9ba3cc03_0.webp) --- ## Tips - Use headphones 🎧 - Don't trust the silence - Your pets matter more than you think - Beyond the world border... better not to go. Or maybe the opposite? --- ## Multiplayer? This mod is not designed for multiplayer, as only one player can be in a single dimension at a time. If you want to explore the dimensions with friends, you can use a walkie-talkie in conjunction with PlasmoVoice or SimpleVoiceChat. This is ideal for long expeditions and for situations where a dimension won’t allow more than one player to enter. You can view the crafting recipes in the recipe book that constantResearch gives you as soon as you enter the world. --- ## Installation 1. Forge 1.19.2 (43.5.0+) 2. Drop the `.jar` into your `mods` folder 3. Launch the game 4. Create a world 5. Play alone I recommend downloading the [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks/versions) mod along with my mod for old-beta atmosphere, and [Sound Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered/versions?g=1.19.2&l=forge) for best sound expirience. --- ## Warning ``` This is a preview version. Everything you see may change. ...or has it already changed? ``` --- *constantResearch* > *don't mess around.* --- ## Support me ❤️ > If you'd like, please support the mod's development - it'll motivate me to keep going :) Drop bank transfer **(Monojar - UAH)** — https://send.monobank.ua/jar/46nANfZRo3 Tether **(TRC20)** — ```TEDDra5VDuxJoQRezMzPdiEWMudbEZppky``` TON **(TON)** — ```UQCM0u7ULNl_rBo7cr_3il5j8OT6VPZFKuX724rhPGMehL1M```
